hooks.command: WORKSPACE=/Users/piotrmatejuk/Desktop/PiotrekMate; LAST=$(grep -o 'Ostatni update: [0-9-]* [0-9:]*' "$WORKSPACE/.claude/rules/NOW.md" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/Ostatni update: //' | head -1); if MEMORY_UPDATE_WORKSPACE="$WORKSPACE" python3 "$WORKSPACE/.claude/skills/memory-update/scripts/parse_sessions.py" --since "${LAST:-2000-01-01}" --stats-json /tmp/mu-hook-stats.json >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; then python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open('/tmp/mu-hook-stats.json')); sys.exit(2 if d.get('sessions',0) > 0 else 0)" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; fi
hooks.rewakeMessage: Wykryto nowe sesje od ostatniego memory update. Uruchom /memory-update.
